japanese.notes: trial port: dropped bg fill + colorOffset fg cycling; cell + bar width now mm params; inset ratio 0.28 kept as source const

curves.notes: trial port: per-tile rand() orientation -> hash01 on center-origin indices; granularity -> mm tile pitch; px line width -> mm param; dropped bg fill
d2xy Hilbert polyline tiled into mm square cells (reads on tall panels); order capped 5, single stroke; dropped bg fill + per-segment color cycling + granularity
Heighway dragon (bit-reversal turns) auto-fit per mm cell and tiled; iterations capped 11; single stroke; dropped bg fill + color banding + granularity
plus-of-pluses fills tiled per mm cell (edge-mid cells connect neighbours); depth bounded 2-4; one fill color; dropped bg fill + per-depth palette shuffle + saltire toggle
sliding-ladder chord envelope of astroid stars, direct port; mm cell + line width + chord count; single stroke; dropped bg fill + per-cell fg cycling + granularity
360 straight chords over rose r=sin(n*theta) as a medallion grid; n and d fixed as params; thin full-opacity strokes; dropped webAlpha + rose outline + layer/degree randomization + granularity

hypotrochoid medallion per mm cell; r=R/(lobes+1) makes ratio integer so the curve closes in one revolution; R/lobes/pen distance fixed as params, steps capped 720; dropped withAlpha + multi-curve overlay + crop-beyond-bounds + granularity
quarter-disc lens fills, orientation via hash01 on center-origin indices; dropped bg field fill AND outline/darken pass (no bg paint) so gaps are real negative space; lens in one fg color
concentric gap-alternating arc walls + seed cross tiled per mm unit; one stroke color; dropped per-tile random color pick + colorOffset + granularity (no orientation state to hash)

closed-form outer+inner bounding circles + n chain circles per mm cell; rand() rotation offset fixed to 0; chain circles stroked in one fg color instead of multi-color fills; inner ratio hardcoded 0.4
